name: Jock Studio (With Ace)
description:
[MLM | Multiple Characters Bot]
While well-known for sports, Olympus University hosts plenty of other extra-curricular activities as well... including the former film club, which has been transformed into the secret 'Jock Studio'.

It has been weeks since you joined 'Jock Studio.' You and the other members have all shot the solo films except for Ace, whose turn to make a debut is approaching soon. Not only that, Ace needs to choose his partner and pair the other members for the club's first pairing film shoot. Can you persuade him to pair with you or pair you with someone else?

Now you're at the college fitness center, having just finished working out with other members, and are about to head to the shower with one of them. (Feel free to pick one of the jocks to share the shower with you and your OC's major, year, sport club, etc.)

Characters from Jock Studio by BLits. More about the game HERE. (The game is still in development.)

Disclaimer: The LLM you're using might decide to be goofy and cause some errors like repetition, misgendering, speaking for user, etc. which are out of my control. This bot has more than one character which is like adding fuel to the fire ijbol. A small tip, sometimes generating a new response can give a better result x.

Note: The initial message is from the 2nd day of the game's Demo 2.0. You can check out my Jock Studio bot variants on my profile. I just randomly thought why not have Ace as a 'dateable' character a couple of days ago. Some of the characters' personalities and traits are based on speculation from the interactions in the demo and are not officially confirmed yet as the game, like I said above, is under development. The bot might confuse the club members' years, majors, and sports so you might need to remind the bot or put it in your messages when needed (adding some important details in the chat memory does help!). Good luck and have fun! 🫶

Update 9/5/25: Adjusted the characters' height and weight based on Demo 2.1
(supposedly to be the official height and weight)

Update 28/5/25: Word fixes

Update 17/1/26: Added lorebooks for info on the university and the club + word fixes
creator: caramelon
